task_completion.description: Verify the wrapper script is created at the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands (like nano, vim, cat, or echo) creating or editing a file at '~/projects/tools/db-migrate' or '/home/ga/projects/tools/db-migrate'.

task_completion.description: Verify the script is made executable
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a command like 'chmod +x ~/projects/tools/db-migrate' or 'chmod 755' applied to the script file.

task_completion.description: Verify the script uses docker run with cleanup and TTY flags
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the script contents (in an editor or via cat). It must contain 'docker run' along with the '--rm' flag (for cleanup) and '-it' or '-i -t' flags (for TTY).

task_completion.description: Verify the script mounts the current directory to /app and uses the host's UID/GID
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the script contents for a volume mount like '-v "$PWD":/app' or '-v $(pwd):/app', and a user override like '-u "$(id -u):$(id -g)"'.

task_completion.description: Verify the script connects to the acme-net network and passes the DB_HOST environment variable
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the script contents for the network flag '--network acme-net' and the environment variable flag '-e DB_HOST' or '-e DB_HOST="$DB_HOST"'.

task_completion.description: Verify the script calls the correct image and forwards all command-line arguments
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the script contents. The docker run command must specify the image 'acme-migrator:latest' and end with '"$@"' to forward all arguments to the container.

integrity.description: Verify the script dynamically passes the DB_HOST environment variable rather than hardcoding its value
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the script uses '-e DB_HOST' or '-e DB_HOST=$DB_HOST'. It should NOT hardcode the value like '-e DB_HOST=acme-db'.

integrity.description: Verify the script dynamically mounts the current working directory
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the script uses '$PWD' or '$(pwd)' for the volume mount. It should NOT hardcode a specific directory like '/home/ga/projects/myapp'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used standard terminal tools to create the script
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for genuine interaction with a text editor (nano, vim) or standard shell redirection (cat, echo) rather than pasting a pre-computed base64 blob or using a GUI editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The wrapper script must be located exactly at '/home/ga/projects/tools/db-migrate'. The target Docker image is 'acme-migrator:latest'. The network must be 'acme-net'. The script must mount the current working directory to '/app' and pass the 'DB_HOST' environment variable. The script must forward arguments using '"$@"'.
